action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py failed locally because /data/test.txt doesn't exist in training container. Best score 22.22% with linear probe. Analysis: Need to fix predict.py and submit eval. Linear probe works better than fine-tuning for domain generalization. Decision: Create clean predict.py that ensembles linear_probe + clip_best with TTA, submit eval with linear_probe checkpoint.
